infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PrePartum uses your camera to add photos to your pregnancy memory bank.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PrePartum uses your microphone to record voice notes for your memories and reflections.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PrePartum accesses your photo library so you can add pregnancy photos to your memory bank.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: PrePartum saves photos to your library when you export your memories.
